news.summary: The market is experiencing growth driven by factors such as increasing demand for sustainable proteins, advancements in waste management solutions, expansion in aquaculture, and regulatory support for insect-based products. A recent market research report reveals that the Black Soldier Fly Market is set to see significant expansion. As of June 20, 2025, the report highlights key trends and forecasts indicating notable growth potential within this sector. Major drivers include growing interest in sustainable protein sources, innovative waste management techniques, expanding aquaculture ventures, and supportive regulations for insect-derived products.
news.headline: BSF market projected to hit $5.6B by 2035, growing at 29% CAGR from 2025. Driven by sustainable protein demand and waste management solutions.

news.summary: As of June 20, 2025, it has been reported that the Game-based Learning Market is expected to experience significant growth from $6.23 billion in 2025 to $17.82 billion by 2030. This projection indicates a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 23.4% during the period of 2025 to 2030. The information comes from a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™. For more detailed insights, interested individuals can explore the comprehensive Table of Contents (TOC) available on the topic of game-based learning.
news.headline: Global game-based learning market to reach $17.82 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 23.4% from 2025 to 2030.

news.summary: Vytautas Vaškys has been re-elected as Chairman of the Board of SBA Group's Utenos Trikotažas company. The decision was reached unanimously by the Board of Directors after the installation of a new Board on April 30, 2025. There were no changes made to the composition of the Board during this process.
news.headline: Vytautas Vaškys re-elected as Chairman of Utenos Trikotažas. The decision made by the Board on April 30, 2025, remains unchanged.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on June 20, 2025, an inventor from Denton, Maryland shared their creation, the CORNER CAMERA, aimed at enhancing visibility of cars, pedestrians, animals, and traffic signs in the immediate vicinity of the vehicle. This innovative solution was developed as a more effective means of alerting drivers to potential obstacles on the road. The inventor's idea stemmed from the belief that current methods of detection could be improved to provide better awareness of surroundings. The CORNER CAMERA design presents drivers with a comprehensive view of the areas directly ahead and to the sides, offering increased safety on the roads.
news.headline: Inventor creates CORNER CAMERA to enhance vehicle safety by providing view of surroundings.
Netanyahu and head of Intelligence visit Modi'in base - reports

news.summary: The global Medical Ultrasound Machines market is valued at $8.5 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach $13.7 billion by 2034, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.1% from 2025 to 2034. The growth is driven by increasing demand across medical specialties like obstetrics and cardiovascular care, technological advancements like portable and handheld devices, 3D/4D imaging, and AI-assisted diagnostics. Factors fueling market growth include the rise in chronic diseases, integrating AI with ultrasound devices, and growing healthcare infrastructure investments. Challenges include the high initial cost of equipment, regulatory complexities, and supply chain disruptions. The market segments include Digital Ultrasound, 3D/4D Ultrasound, Doppler Ultrasound, and Analog Ultrasound each catering to specific clinical needs, with diagnostic imaging, obstetrics/gynecology, and cardiovascular imaging being major application areas. Hospitals are the dominant end-users, with diagnostic imaging centers and specialty clinics also driving demand for advanced medical equipment. Portable ultrasound machines are seeing the fastest growth in the market.
news.headline: Global Medical Ultrasound Machines market valued at $8.5 billion in 2024, projected to reach around $13.7 billion by 2034 with a CAGR of 5.1% from 2025 to 2034. Ultrasound technology advancing with portable devices, 3D/4D imaging, and AI diagnostics, catering to increased demand in healthcare specialties. Rising chronic diseases boosting demand. Challenges include cost, regulations, and supply chain disruptions. Ultrasound market segmented by technology, applications, end-users, and product types. Hospitals leading end-users, diagnostic imaging and obstetrics major application areas. Significant clinical and market growth anticipated.

news.summary: The global automotive systems integration market is set to reach about USD 45 billion in 2024, with a projected valuation of nearly USD 80 billion by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 6.1%. This growth is driven by increasing demand for smart technologies and vehicle connectivity. Key drivers include the integration of advanced driver-assistance systems (ADAS) and the rise of electric and autonomous vehicles. Challenges include supply chain disruptions and regulatory demands. Growth opportunities lie in connected vehicle analytics, mobility-as-a-service platforms, and cybersecurity solutions. North America leads with 35% of global market revenue, while Asia-Pacific is expected to grow the fastest at a CAGR of 7%. Major players in the market include Continental AG, Bosch Mobility Solutions, and Nvidia Corporation. Notable recent developments include Continental AG’s launch of next-generation ADAS and Bosch Mobility Solutions partnering with an EV startup.
news.headline: Global automotive systems integration market set to reach USD 80 billion by 2034, growing at 6.1% CAGR from USD 45 billion in 2024. Major drivers: ADAS integration and demand for smart vehicle technologies. Challenges include supply chain disruptions and regulatory compliance. Top regions are North America, Europe, and Asia-Pacific. Key players include Continental AG, Bosch Mobility Solutions, and Nvidia Corporation. Exciting growth opportunities in connected vehicle analytics and cybersecurity solutions.
RUSSIA'S NOVAK URGES KAZAKHSTAN TO CONTINUE OPEC+ COOPERATION - STATEMENT

news.summary: In compliance with an executive order issued by former President Trump, Microsoft has temporarily halted the email account of a prosecutor from the International Criminal Court located in the Netherlands. The prosecutor was conducting an investigation into alleged war crimes committed by Israel.
news.headline: Europe is concerned about being disadvantaged by US tech. Microsoft complied with Trump's order, suspending email of ICC prosecutor probing Israel.
Iran's Foreign Minister Araghchi Reaches Geneva For Talks With E3 Foreign Ministers
Breaking: U.S. Imposes New Sanctions Linked To Iran, According To U.S. Treasury Website

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the total number of COVID-19 cases in the country has surpassed 1 million, with 20,000 new cases reported in the last 24 hours alone. The death toll has also increased to over 50,000, with 500 new fatalities recorded in the same period. Health officials are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines, including wearing masks and practicing social distancing, to curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, vaccination efforts are being ramped up in an attempt to control the surge in cases and prevent further casualties.
news.headline: Stocks in the US rise after the Federal Reserve’s Waller hints at possible rate cut in July.

news.summary: An announcement was made in Ankeny, Iowa on June 20, 2025, by Moehl Millwork about the launch of their new Glenview entry doors. These doors are crafted to improve the curb appeal and energy efficiency of homes. In addition, they also introduced beautiful interior doors that aim to provide a superior modern flush interior door design. Both types of doors incorporate cutting-edge European technology.
news.headline: Moehl Millwork showcases Glenview Doors in 8,000 sq ft showroom in Ankeny, Iowa. New doors focus on curb appeal and energy efficiency.

news.summary: KB Home will release its quarterly earnings report on 2025-06-23, with analysts anticipating an EPS of $2.23. The market is hopeful for positive news surpassing estimates and providing upbeat guidance for the next quarter, as guidance can significantly impact stock prices. In the last quarter, KB Home missed EPS by $0.10, leading to a 5.21% drop in share price the next day. Past performance shows mixed results in EPS estimates and actuals, with share price changes ranging from -5.0% to 5.0%. KB Home shares were priced at $50.62 on June 19, with a 28.94% decline over the last 52 weeks. Analysts rate KB Home as Neutral, with an average one-year price target of $63.56 indicating a 25.56% upside potential. Peer ratings indicate a similar sentiment. This information is sourced from Benzinga.com.
news.headline: KB Home will release Q2 earnings on 2025-06-23, with anticipated EPS of $2.23. Past misses led to share drops. Stock trading at $50.62, down 28.94% in 52-weeks. Analysts give KBH a Neutral rating with price target of $63.56, implying 25.56% upside. Examine peers for broader industry insights.

news.summary: FactSet Research Systems (NYSE: FDS) is set to release its quarterly earnings report on Monday, 2025-06-23, with analysts predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of $4.30. Investors will closely watch for any beat on this estimate and positive guidance for future growth. Last quarter, the company exceeded EPS estimates by $0.10, resulting in a 0.45% share price increase the following day. FactSet's recent performance includes beating EPS estimates for the past four quarters, with varied price changes. As of June 19, FactSet shares were trading at $425.04, exhibiting a 0.68% increase over the last 52 weeks. With a consensus rating of Neutral from 3 analysts, market sentiments and expectations surrounding FactSet Research Systems remain pivotal for investors.
news.headline: FactSet Research Systems to release quarterly earnings report on 2025-06-23, anticipated EPS of $4.30. Analysts hope for positive guidance. Shares trading at $425.04 with 0.68% increase over 52 weeks. Consensus rating of Neutral from 3 analysts.

news.summary: Jerash Holdings (US) (NASDAQ: JRSH) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on Monday, June 23, 2025. Analysts predict that the company will announce an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.04. Investors are eagerly awaiting this announcement, hoping for results that exceed expectations and positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Jerash Holdings (US) to announce quarterly earnings on June 23, with estimated EPS of $0.04. Investors await news on surpassing estimates.
Israel's UN Ambassador Emphasizes Need for Serious Steps to Reduce Iran's Power

news.summary: The latest jobs report for April exceeded expectations, showing promising strength in the economy. However, concerns linger over the potential impact of Trump's tariffs. Following the positive data, S&P 500 futures saw a rise, indicating optimism among investors. This post-jobs report development suggests that there may still be time to avert a downturn caused by Trump's tariffs, and provides a boost in confidence as reflected in the increased S&P 500 futures.
news.headline: April jobs report stronger than expected, S&P 500 futures rose. Tariff impact approaching. Good news for economy.

news.summary: Stocks of Netflix and movie studios are recovering from losses following the threat of tariffs on foreign-produced films. The potential tax imposed by Trump could impact the industry, with Netflix particularly vulnerable. The specifics of how this tax would function remain uncertain.
news.headline: Trump threatens to tax foreign-made movies, impacting Netflix and movie studio stocks. details on how it would work.

news.summary: Investors are becoming cautious as Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell expresses concerns about the potential inflation impact of President Trump's tariffs. Powell is cautious and emphasizes the risks of stagflation, highlighting a growing sense of uncertainty. This has led to fluctuations in the S&P 500 index, with investors watching closely.
news.headline: Fed chair Powell warns of stagflation risk due to Trump tariffs, causing 'uncertainty'; S&P 500 fluctuates.

news.summary: On Thursday, a trade deal between the United States and the United Kingdom was revealed, with expectations for more deals to follow in order to mitigate the tariffs imposed during the Trump administration. Companies such as Amazon, Google, and Meta are set to benefit from this agreement. The trade deal maintains a 10% tariff, but despite this, the S&P 500 saw a boost, reflecting positive market sentiment.
news.headline: US-UK trade deal retains 10% tariff but expected to lift Trump tariffs. Amazon, Google, Meta benefit; S&P 500 rallies.

news.summary: In anticipation of crucial U.S.-China trade discussions over the weekend, President Trump suggested an 80% tariff, asserting its appropriateness. Despite this hard stance, the S&P 500 saw gains as Wall Street remained optimistic about the negotiations. The news of Trump's approach on tariffs and the market's positive response were highlighted, signaling the significance of the upcoming talks.
news.headline: Trump takes tough stance on tariffs ahead of U.S.-China trade talks; S&P 500 rises. "80% Tariff seems right." Wall Street optimistic.

news.summary: The recent U.S.-China trade agreement has resulted in a reduction of tariffs by over 100%, leading to a significant surge in the S&P 500 on Monday. Despite this positive development, potential risks still persist following the deal.
news.headline: U.S.-China trade deal reduces tariffs by over 100%, S&P 500 rises dramatically. Risks remain.

news.summary: The latest Federal Reserve inflation rate has dropped to its lowest point since March 2021, marking a significant four-year low. This development has coincided with a slight dip in the S&P 500 index.
news.headline: Fed's key inflation rate hits lowest level since March 2021; S&P 500 dips in response.

news.summary: In Salt Lake City today, Kindly MD, Inc. (NASDAQ: NAKA) shared news of securing $51.5 million through a private placement in public equity ("PIPE financing"). This funding will aid in their mission to create a Bitcoin treasury. With this recent investment, KindlyMD has now successfully raised around $563 million in PIPE financing. When combined with convertible n, the total amount raised stands at $763 million. The company, which had previously disclosed its plans to merge with Nakamoto Holdings Inc., a Bitcoin-focused holding company, continues to make significant strides in their financial endeavors.
news.headline: KindlyMD and Nakamoto secure $51.5 million in PIPE financing, totaling $563 million to establish Bitcoin treasury.

news.summary: The trade truce between the United States and China is at risk as both countries have accused each other of breaching the agreement. This development comes amidst escalating tensions in the tech sector. The S&P 500 futures have witnessed a decline in response to this uncertainty, indicating investor concern. It remains essential to monitor the situation for further developments as this could have significant implications for global trade.
news.headline: U.S.-China trade talks facing uncertainty after accusations of deal violations. S&P 500 futures drop amid tech war tensions.

news.summary: On June 9, 2025, Lido Merger Sub, Inc. disclosed the extension of the Expiration Date for its ongoing cash tender offer to buy all of Landsea Homes Corporation’s 8.875% Senior Notes due 2029 and seek consents from the holders on proposed indenture amendments. The new deadline allows more time for stakeholders to participate in the Tender Offer and Consent Solicitation. This development was announced by the Company based in New York.
news.headline: Lido Merger Sub, Inc. extends the expiration date of its tender offer for Landsea Homes Corporation's 8.875% Senior Notes due 2029.

news.summary: A recent press release states that ISG, a company based in Stamford, Connecticut, has initiated four new research studies focusing on providers of services tailored to meet the intricate requirements of insurance enterprises. These studies aim to delve deeper into the industry and provide valuable insights for businesses operating in this sector.
news.headline: ISG conducting four studies on insurance service providers in Stamford, examining their offerings.

news.summary: The latest private hiring data reveals a significant slowdown, marking the lowest numbers recorded since March 2023. This decline comes as former President Trump criticizes the Federal Reserve following a notably weak ADP jobs report. Despite these concerning figures, the S&P 500 index experienced a rise in the market.
news.headline: Trump criticizes Fed due to weak ADP jobs report; private hiring lowest since March 2023. S&P 500 rises.

news.summary: Uniti Group Inc. has disclosed that its subsidiaries, Uniti Group LP, Uniti Fiber Holdings Inc., Uniti Group Finance 2019 Inc., and CSL Capital, LLC, have priced an offering of $600 million in total of 8.625% Senior Unsecured Notes due 2032. These notes are set to be issued at an issue price of 100.000% and will be guaranteed on a senior unsecured basis by the Company and its subsidiaries, excluding the issuers. The offering is anticipated to be finalized on June 24, 2025.
news.headline: Uniti Group Inc. priced $600 million of Senior Unsecured Notes due 2032 at 8.625%, expected to close on June 24, 2025.

news.summary: A recent household survey revealed a significant decline in both employment rates and labor force participation. Despite this, the latest Jobs Report indicated decent hiring numbers, leading to a rise in the S&P 500 index. This suggests that while there may be some positive aspects in the job market, there are underlying signs of a cooling labor market with decreasing participation rates.
news.headline: Jobs report indicates decent hiring but also reveals a drop in employment and labor force participation. S&P 500 rises.

news.summary: On June 16, 2025, Guardian Capital LP disclosed the upcoming regular cash distributions for the period ending June 30, 2025, pertaining to the ETF series of Guardian Capital funds. These distributions are set to be paid on June 30, 2025, to unitholders recorded on June 24, 2025. The ex-dividend date for each is expected to be on June 24, 2025.
news.headline: Guardian Capital in Toronto declares cash distributions for their Guardian Capital ETFs for June 2025, payable on June 30, 2025, with a record date of June 24, 2025.

news.summary: In New York, J.P. Morgan recently announced significant updates to its J.P. Morgan Self-Directed Investing platform, introducing advanced features with a focus on fixed income investments. This includes improved accessibility for investors interested in corporate bonds, Treasuries, and other fixed income products. Through the Chase mobile app or Chase.com, users can now conveniently explore and invest in these securities using newly added user-friendly tools. One notable addition is the Yield Comparison Table, designed to simplify the process of comparing and trading fixed income products. This update aims to enhance the investing experience, providing customers with more streamlined options for managing their portfolios effectively.
news.headline: J.P. Morgan adds user-friendly fixed income features to Self-Directed Investing platform, simplifying bond investment.

news.summary: In the fiscal year 2025, the Audio Division comprising Slacker Radio and PodcastOne reported impressive financial results. They achieved record revenue of $108.9 million, surpassing the initial guidance by $2.9 million. Additionally, the division recorded a record adjusted EBITDA of $18.2 million, exceeding the guidance by over 51% or $6.2 million. These strong numbers demonstrate the division's financial success and growth in the specified fiscal year.
news.headline: LiveOne's audio division (Nasdaq: LVO) surpasses guidance with $108.9M revenue (+$2.9M) and $18.2M EBITDA (+51% or $6.2M) in 2025.

news.summary: In Los Angeles on June 18, 2025, PodcastOne (Nasdaq: PODC) revealed its financial performance for the fourth fiscal quarter of 2025 and the fiscal year ending on March 31, 2025. As a prominent publisher and podcast sales network, PodcastOne shared key highlights from the report.
news.headline: PodcastOne (NASDAQ: PODC) reports record Q4 Fiscal 2025 results with strong financial performance. Los Angeles, June 18, 2025.

news.summary: According to Wall Street strategists, negotiations between the U.S. and China regarding trade have been expedited due to Beijing's recent limitations on rare earth exports. There is a possibility that the U.S. might reconsider its restrictions on chips in exchange for access to rare earth minerals. This strategic move is perceived as a potential development in the ongoing trade discussions between the two nations.
news.headline: U.S.-China trade talks may involve U.S. trade-offs: rare earths for chip restrictions, as Beijing's rare earths export curbs prompt urgency.

news.summary: In Culver City, California, Stackup, an asset management platform for crypto businesses, has revealed the successful acquisition of $4.2 million in seed funding. This financial boost was made possible by a funding round spearheaded by 1kx, which also saw contributions from renowned investors such as Y Combinator, Goodwater Capital, Soma Capital, Amino Capital, and Digital Currency Group (DCG). The capital injection will propel the advancement of the Stackup platform, enabling the team to further enhance their solutions aimed at simplifying crypto operations.
news.headline: Stackup, a digital asset management platform for crypto businesses, secures $4.2 million in seed funding led by 1kx.

news.summary: In the recent U.S.-China trade agreement, President Trump announced an increase in tariffs on Chinese goods to 55%. Additionally, there has been a resolution regarding rare earths. The deal raises questions about what benefits China will receive in return.
news.headline: U.S.-China trade deal raises tariffs on Chinese goods to 55%, settles rare earths issue. Details on what China gains still unclear.

news.summary: In Athens, Greece on June 18, 2025, Euroseas Ltd. (NASDAQ: ESEA), a company specializing in container carrier vessels and containerized cargo transportation, released its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company also declared a dividend for its common stock.
news.headline: Euroseas Ltd. announced Q1 2025 results, declares common stock dividend; vessel operator, NASDAQ: ESEA.

news.summary: On June 16, 2025, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that Southpoint Bancshares Inc. (OTCQX: SOUB), a company active in the domestic commercial banking sector, has met the requirements to trade on the OTCQX® Best Market. OTC Markets Group Inc. operates regulated trading markets for 12,000 U.S. and international securities. Southpoint Bancshares Inc. made the move from the Pink® market to the OTCQX, enhancing its trading status.
news.headline: OTC Markets welcomes Southpoint Bancshares to OTCQX, trading 12,000 securities. SOUB moves from Pink market.

news.summary: A recent medical opinion suggests that Beyond Oil could potentially lower the risk of gastrointestinal cancer among individuals who frequently consume fried foods and food service workers. This alternative oil product has shown promising results in reducing the likelihood of developing this type of cancer. This could offer a significant benefit to the significant number of people who are at risk due to their dietary habits or occupational exposure. The potential impact of incorporating Beyond Oil into their regular food preparation and consumption routines highlights its importance in potentially mitigating health risks associated with frequent fried food consumption.
news.headline: Prof. Ilan Ron's medical opinion suggests Beyond Oil can reduce cancer risks for fried food consumers and service workers.

news.summary: On Tuesday, the stock market experienced a decline due to speculation that President Donald Trump was considering participating in an attack on Iran. Among the companies impacted, Tesla recorded substantial losses. Federal Reserve Chairman Powell is scheduled to make an appearance. Dow Jones Futures showed an increase in anticipation of Powell's statements and Trump's decision regarding Iran.
news.headline: Stock market fell Tuesday as Trump considers joining attack on Iran; Tesla down. Dow Jones futures rise before Fed Chief Powell.

news.summary: On June 18, 2025, in Mayfield Village, Ohio, The Progressive Corporation (NYSE:PGR) released its financial results for the month ending May 31, 2025. The report includes key figures, but exact details were not provided.
news.headline: Progressive Corporation (PGR) reports May 2025 results in Mayfield Village, Ohio - details undisclosed.

news.summary: Toronto, June 12, 2025 - Critical One Energy Inc. (formerly Madison Metals Inc.), known as Critical One, has revealed its collaboration with Dark Star Minerals Inc., a uranium-focused, publicly-listed company. The agreement entails Dark Star acquiring 100% of Critical One's stakes in the Khan and Cobra Uranium Projects, sited in Namibia's promising Erongo uranium province. Critical One is listed as CSE: CRTL, OTCQB: MMTLF, FSE: 4EF0, while Dark Star is listed as CSE: BATT, FSE: P0W.
news.headline: Critical One Energy Inc. is divesting its uranium assets to Dark Star Minerals Inc. in Namibia's Erongo province.

news.summary: A prominent eDiscovery and legal technology firm, The MCS Group, based in Philadelphia, has recently achieved the prestigious Relativity aiR for Review Competency from renowned legal technology company, Relativity. This recognition signifies the firm's proficiency in utilizing specific solutions within RelativityOne, showcasing top-tier service quality. Partners securing this distinction have proven outstanding competence in leveraging these specialized Relativity capabilities.
news.headline: MCS Group earns Relativity aiR for Review Competency, enhancing AI capabilities in legal tech.

news.summary: Following the attack by Hamas on Israel on October 7, 2023, Iran's strategic standing has significantly deteriorated. The incident has resulted in a substantial blow to Iran's global influence, with critics suggesting that the country has never appeared weaker. In response to the attack, Israel experienced a surge in military action, causing fluctuations in the stock market as well. This event has drawn attention to the escalating tensions in the region and raised concerns about the potential consequences on a global scale.
news.headline: Iran's strategic position weakened after Hamas's Oct. 7, 2023, attack on Israel, impacting stocks.

news.summary: Derek Bryson Park was recently highlighted in a detailed article by Enterprise Chronicles, a prominent business publication, titled “The Untold Story of Derek Bryson Park and Financial Rescue after 9/11”. The article discusses Mr. Park’s significant but often overlooked contribution to stabilizing the financial sector post the tragic events of September 11, 2001. Park's pivotal role in the efforts following the attacks is underscored, shedding light on his crucial involvement.
news.headline: Enterprise Chronicles highlights Derek Bryson Park's role in post-9/11 financial recovery, emphasizing his crucial yet unnoticed contributions in stabilizing finances after the 2001 attacks.

news.summary: Circle Pharma, a biopharmaceutical company based in South San Francisco, announced today that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has awarded Orphan Drug Designation (ODD) to CID-078 for treating small cell lung cancer (SCLC). SCLC is a fast-growing type of lung cancer, representing around 13-15% of all lung cancer cases. This designation recognizes the potential of CID-078 in addressing a rare and severe medical condition, highlighting its importance as a therapeutic option for patients with SCLC.
news.headline: Circle Pharma's CID-078 receives FDA Orphan Drug Designation for SCLC, accounting for 13-15% of lung cancer cases.

news.summary: Entri, a prominent provider of automated domain setup solutions based in Leesburg, VA, has revealed a new partnership with GoDaddy. The multi-year agreement will see Entri integrating GoDaddy's Domain Connect System into their platform, Entri Connect. This collaboration aims to streamline DNS configuration for Entri customers and their clients through a quick, one-click process. Abe Storey, the CEO of Entri, expressed the company's dedication to simplifying the online launch process. This partnership with GoDaddy will enhance the service provided by Entri by offering faster DNS configuration.
news.headline: Entri partners with GoDaddy to simplify domain setup globally. Multi-year deal brings one-click DNS config for customers.

news.summary: In a recent update, it has been reported that the total number of COVID-19 cases globally has surpassed 10 million, with over 500,000 deaths recorded. The United States remains the most affected country, with over 2.5 million confirmed cases and 125,000 deaths. In efforts to curb the spread of the virus, many countries are implementing strict measures such as lockdowns and social distancing guidelines. Despite progress in some regions, the World Health Organization has warned that the pandemic is far from over and continues to pose a significant threat to public health worldwide.
news.headline: Citadel's Head of Fixed Income, Edwin Lin, to take sabbatical from position.
